message:
feat(freeze): Add private field access opcodes

Add get_private_field, put_private_field, and define_private_field
opcodes to complete private class field support in frozen interpreter.

This enables freezing classes that use private fields (#field syntax).

- Add wrapper functions to QuickJS patch (JS_FrozenGetPrivateField, etc.)
- Implement opcodes in both trampoline and fast path switches
